svg.title: Shizzywang Crest with rectified named heraldic lions
svg.desc: Pixel-style heraldic crest with readable named external lions. Each external lion is a separate group for show/hide interactions.

svg.title: Pixel Heraldic Crest - clean finger bars (heraldic_crest_finger_fixed_tan)
svg.desc: This version keeps the earlier better crest base and fixes the sword hand by using two clean finger bars across the handle. The lion arm, sword hilt, sword blade, and fingers are separated into their own groups for editing.
